languages.text: "Что за мудрец выдвинул постулат о машинном духе? Было бы интересно ознакомиться с его трудами".
"Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."
languages.original_text: "Что за мудрец выдвинул постулат о машинном духе? Было бы интересно ознакомиться с его трудами".

traits.locale_text: "Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."
"Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."
"Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."

languages.text: 「機械霊の性質について理論を立てたこの賢者とは誰だれだ？彼の作品を読むのは興味深い」
languages.original_text: "Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."

languages.text: "Wer ist dieser Weise, der über das Wesen des Maschinengeistes theorisiert hat? Ich würde seine Arbeiten gerne lesen."
languages.original_text: "Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."

traits.locale_text: "Wer ist dieser Weise, der über das Wesen des Maschinengeistes theorisiert hat? Ich würde seine Arbeiten gerne lesen."

languages.text: «¿Quién es ese sabio que ha especulado sobre la naturaleza del espíritu máquina? Me interesaría leer su obra».
languages.original_text: "Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."

traits.locale_text: «¿Quién es ese sabio que ha especulado sobre la naturaleza del espíritu máquina? Me interesaría leer su obra».

languages.text: "Makine ruhunun doğası üzerine teori üreten bu bilge de kim? Çalışmalarını okumak ilginç olabilir."
languages.original_text: "Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."

traits.locale_text: "Makine ruhunun doğası üzerine teori üreten bu bilge de kim? Çalışmalarını okumak ilginç olabilir."

languages.text: « Qui est donc ce sage qui a théorisé la nature de l'esprit de la machine ? J'aimerais beaucoup lire ses travaux. »
languages.original_text: "Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."

traits.locale_text: « Qui est donc ce sage qui a théorisé la nature de l'esprit de la machine ? J'aimerais beaucoup lire ses travaux. »

languages.text: “这位将机魂的本质理论化的智者是谁？研读他的著作定能给人启发。”
languages.original_text: "Who is this wiseman who theorised on the nature of the machine spirit? It would be interesting to read his work."

traits.locale_text: “这位将机魂的本质理论化的智者是谁？研读他的著作定能给人启发。”
